name: Dumbbell Romanian Deadlift
cues: Soft knees, push the hips back
Dumbbells travel close to the legs
Feel the hamstring stretch, then drive the hips forward
execution_steps: Stand holding a dumbbell in each hand in front of your thighs, feet hip-width, knees softly bent.
Push your hips straight back, letting the dumbbells slide down close along your legs.
Lower until you feel a strong stretch in your hamstrings while keeping your back flat.
Drive your hips forward to stand tall, squeezing your glutes at the top.
good_when: You want a stretch-biased hamstring hinge without loading a barbell across your spine.
You train at home or only have dumbbells available.
You are still learning the hinge and want lighter, more controllable loading.
bad_when: Grip or dumbbell weight becomes the limiter before your hamstrings do (switch to a barbell RDL).
You want maximal loading for pure strength work.
